title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・足りない欠片

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Guess what?! I beat the top senior-year racer
herself, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! This is proof I can fight at the senior
level!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Which race am I doing next? Whatever it is, I'm
gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Based on her performance today, she is ready to
prove herself on the grand stage...
choice_data_list: Let's go for the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Now we're talking the big, big leagues! Prez
has won that one too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah. Let's do it! This is nothing I can't handle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several days later...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew... Thanks for training me today!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I think I really put my back into it again! I feel on
top of the world!
choice_data_list:
Make sure you carry that energy into the next
race!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Who's that running over there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Can't stop now... Just one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Huh... The day's almost over, but McQueen's still
going at it...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That unrelenting drive is the mark of a true
fighter.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ah, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
She's really giving it her all, isn't she? I wonder if
it's because she lost.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! What a pity, because no matter how many
times she goes up against me, I'll always win!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You saw it too, right? Our race?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...However, I do not think the next race will have
the same outcome.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
McQueen will only grow from here... I'd love to
race with her.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: H-hold on! I'm the one who won. You know that, right? Shouldn't you want to race with me?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can see it just by watching her. She has
something you lack.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What do I lack?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I will not mince words with you, Teio. If you race
her in your current state...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: You will surely lose.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Y-you can't possibly know that!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm at the top of my game! And you're saying she's going to win?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Yes. No matter how many times you try to best
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's won the spring Tenno Sho, there's
no denying Tokai Teio's achievements.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet, Symboli Rudolf's words shake her to her
very core.
